caption: The video captures a tender moment in what appears to be a hospital setting, likely during a simulation week as indicated by the "Sim Week" text on the screen. A woman is lying in a hospital bed, holding a baby wrapped in a pink blanket, while a man sits beside her, both wearing masks. They seem to be engaged in a conversation with a healthcare professional who is standing and gesturing towards them. The atmosphere suggests a postpartum scenario where the healthcare provider might be offering advice or instructions. The "Day 3" label implies that this interaction is taking place three days after the birth of the baby. The scene conveys a sense of care and support within a medical environment.
